sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77815" key="parabola=noi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραβολ-ᾶνοι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, in Lat. form <sense id="n77815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parabalani, persons who risk their lives as sick-nurses,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Theod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.2.42</biblScope></bibl>, al.; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parabalanin,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
